name: Tensei Ryu-Ge Anva
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>転</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>惺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>巴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ば</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
You cannot Pendulum Summon, except "Ryu-Ge" monsters (this effect cannot be negated). You can negate your opponent's card or effect activated in response to the activation of your "Ryu-Ge" Spell Card or effect, then destroy this card. You can only use this effect of "Tensei Ryu-Ge Anva" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
You can Tribute 1 "Ryu-Ge" monster from your hand or field, except "Tensei Ryu-Ge Anva"; Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. If this card is destroyed: You can place 1 "Ryu-Ge" Continuous Spell/Trap from your Deck, GY, or banishment, face-up on your field. You can only use each effect of "Tensei Ryu-Ge Anva" once per turn.
pend_eff: You cannot Pendulum Summon, except "Ryu-Ge" monsters (this effect cannot be negated). You can negate your opponent's card or effect activated in response to the activation of your "Ryu-Ge" Spell Card or effect, then destroy this card. You can only use this effect of "Tensei Ryu-Ge Anva" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute 1 "Ryu-Ge" monster from your hand or field, except "Tensei Ryu-Ge Anva"; Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. If this card is destroyed: You can place 1 "Ryu-Ge" Continuous Spell/Trap from your Deck, GY, or banishment, face-up on your field. You can only use each effect of "Tensei Ryu-Ge Anva" once per turn.
eff: You can Tribute 1 "Ryu-Ge" monster from your hand or field, except "Tensei Ryu-Ge Anva"; Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. If this card is destroyed: You can place 1 "Ryu-Ge" Continuous Spell/Trap from your Deck, GY, or banishment, face-up on your field. You can only use each effect of "Tensei Ryu-Ge Anva" once per turn.

action: Places cards from Deck in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from Graveyard in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from banishment in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Restricts the player's Pendulum Summons to archetype specific monsters
Special Summons itself from your hand
